name: io.github.parseur/parseur-py
title: Parseur
description: Manage Parseur.com mailboxes, parser fields, documents, exports and webhooks.

runtimeArguments.name: --from
runtimeArguments.description: Install parseur-py with the MCP server extra.

environmentVariables.name: PARSEUR_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Override the Parseur API base URL (defaults to https://api.parseur.com).
